# Dragonglass

> Dragonglass is an HTML5-first, pure CSS framework for semantic app interfaces, compiled color themes and focused utility classes.

## Getting started

- [Home](./index.html.md): Learn how Dragonglass styles semantic HTML and where to find each component.
- [App components](./app-components.html.md): Find application components by purpose and open their examples and API.

## Foundations

- [Layout](./layout.html.md): Responsive containers, direct-child content regions and toolbar layouts.
- [Hero recipes](./heroes.html.md): Centered, split and presentation hero recipes composed from existing primitives.

## Actions

- [Buttons](./buttons.html.md): Base button styles, semantic color utilities and FAB variants.
- [Links](./links.html.md): Inline, standalone and quiet link treatments for navigation and supporting actions.
- [Chips](./chips.html.md): Chip tones and checked, pressed and current visual states.

## Forms

- [Forms](./forms.html.md): Field, floating-label, validation-state and toggle selectors.

## Navigation

- [Breadcrumbs](./breadcrumbs.html.md): Wrapping breadcrumb trails built from direct link and button children.
- [Toolbars](./toolbars.html.md): Wrapping nav[data-toolbar] rows and container variants.
- [Tabs](./tabs.html.md): Grouped details layout selected by data-tabs.
- [Menus](./menus.html.md): Positioned menus inside details[data-trigger].
- [Expansion panels](./expansion-panels.html.md): Full-width details panels with a generated open-state marker.
- [Steppers](./steppers.html.md): Horizontal, vertical and numbers-only stepper presentations.

## Feedback

- [Alerts](./alerts.html.md): Alert surfaces with info, success, warning and danger tones.
- [Notifications](./notifications.html.md): Fixed and inline notifications with tone, position and shadow tokens.
- [Progress](./progress.html.md): Determinate, indeterminate and spinner styles for progress elements.

## Surfaces

- [Cards](./cards.html.md): Basic, elevated, squared and full-width card variants.
- [Dialogs](./dialogs.html.md): Centered dialogs with shape, width and elevation variants.
- [Bottom sheets](./bottom-sheets.html.md): Bottom-anchored dialog layout with an optional shadow.

## Data display

- [Lists](./lists.html.md): Styled unordered, ordered and definition-list layouts.
- [Badges](./badges.html.md): Generated badge content selected by data-badge.
- [Tooltips](./tooltips.html.md): Generated tooltip content, positions and color utilities.
- [Tables](./tables.html.md): Responsive data-table layout with generated mobile cell labels.

## Utilities

- [Utilities](./utilities.html.md): Find focused spacing, layout, border, typography, elevation and color adjustments.
- [Grid](./grid.html.md): Wrapping flex rows, gutters and responsive fractional widths.
- [Positioning](./positioning.html.md): Fixed and absolute placement through directional data-position tokens.
- [Images](./images.html.md): Object-fit, focal-position and background image utilities.
- [Elevations](./elevations.html.md): Outer shadows, inset shadows and explicit stacking utilities.
- [Colors](./colors.html.md): Semantic color tokens, utility classes, bundled themes, and custom theme compilation.
- [Fonts](./fonts.html.md): Font size, style, weight, transform, line-height and alignment utilities.

## Optional

- [Default theme](./themes/default.html.md): Preview the Default theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Indigo theme](./themes/indigo.html.md): Preview the Indigo theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Violet theme](./themes/violet.html.md): Preview the Violet theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Magenta theme](./themes/magenta.html.md): Preview the Magenta theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Ruby theme](./themes/ruby.html.md): Preview the Ruby theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Amber theme](./themes/amber.html.md): Preview the Amber theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Moss theme](./themes/moss.html.md): Preview the Moss theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Emerald theme](./themes/emerald.html.md): Preview the Emerald theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Teal theme](./themes/teal.html.md): Preview the Teal theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Ocean theme](./themes/ocean.html.md): Preview the Ocean theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Graphite theme](./themes/graphite.html.md): Preview the Graphite theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Stone theme](./themes/stone.html.md): Preview the Stone theme in light mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Default dark theme](./themes/dark/default.html.md): Preview the Default theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Indigo dark theme](./themes/dark/indigo.html.md): Preview the Indigo theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Violet dark theme](./themes/dark/violet.html.md): Preview the Violet theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Magenta dark theme](./themes/dark/magenta.html.md): Preview the Magenta theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Ruby dark theme](./themes/dark/ruby.html.md): Preview the Ruby theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Amber dark theme](./themes/dark/amber.html.md): Preview the Amber theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Moss dark theme](./themes/dark/moss.html.md): Preview the Moss theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Emerald dark theme](./themes/dark/emerald.html.md): Preview the Emerald theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Teal dark theme](./themes/dark/teal.html.md): Preview the Teal theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Ocean dark theme](./themes/dark/ocean.html.md): Preview the Ocean theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Graphite dark theme](./themes/dark/graphite.html.md): Preview the Graphite theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
- [Stone dark theme](./themes/dark/stone.html.md): Preview the Stone theme in dark mode across semantic colors, components, and interactive states.
